title: Pokemon Info Town
description: The ultimate resource island! Complete habitat guides, item locations, and rare Pokemon spawns all in one place. Updated weekly with new finds.
author: Official

title: SASHIHARA Island
description: Official developer showcase island with unique furniture, statues, fountains, and a special Ditto bathtub! Great for reference photos.
author: Official

title: EIKO City
description: Features rare Plusle & Minun habitats, urban design inspiration, and unique garden ornaments. Take reference photos for 3D printing!
author: Official

title: Color Peach Island
description: New official island featuring colorful peach-themed decorations and unique design elements.
author: Official

title: Community Resource Island
description: 60 special patterns (Smeargle and Vespiquen), all flowers, hedges, fruits, biomes, rare items, and Gimmighoul stones!
author: @Mel_shota
